  • Open

    Taco Bell Tests Supreme and Loaded Taco Nacho Fries
    Taco Bell is testing "Everyday Nacho Fries" for a limited time at participating locations in the Charlotte, NC area. Everyday Nacho Fries include Supreme Nacho Fries and Loaded Taco Nacho Fries. The test locations appear to be serving one or the other, but not both. Each is priced at $4.99. Supreme Nacho Fries feature seasoned fries topped with seasoned beef, Spicy Ranch sauce, warm nacho cheese sauce, reduced-fat sour cream, diced tomatoes, and a 3-cheese blend (mozzarella, pepper jack, and cheddar). Loaded Taco Nacho Fries feature seasoned fries topped with seasoned beef, warm nacho cheese sauce, shredded lettuce, diced tomatoes, shredded cheddar cheese, Spicy Ranch sauce, and crispy Fiesta Strips. Loaded Taco Nacho Fries were previously released nationally as a limited-time item, while Supreme Nacho Fries are very similar to the limited-time Nacho Fries Supreme that accompanied the initial launch of Taco Bell's Nacho Fries. Given the "everyday" moniker, it looks like Taco Bell is exploring adding a topped Nacho Fries dish to its menu permanently. Photo via Taco Bell. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 14 min )

  • Open

    Nothing Bundt Cake Reveals Limited-Time Cakes for January and February 2026
    Cake bakery chain Nothing Bundt Cakes reveals its upcoming limited-time selection of bundt cakes in January and February 2026. The upcoming lineup is as follows: - Biscoff Cookie Butter Cake - A returning flavor that sold out at 233 locations during its 2025 debut, the Biscoff Cookie Butter Cake features a spice cake with Biscoff Cookie Butter baked into the batter and Biscoff cookies baked into its base and layered on top. Biscoff Cookie Butter is also drizzled on top. The flavor is available from January 5 through February 15, 2026, while supplies last in all cake sizes - New-Fashioned Marble With Chocolate Frosting -  A yellow-and-chocolate marble cake topped with chocolate ganache cream cheese frosting (this is the first time that Nothing Bundt Cakes has offered a chocolate frosting) and chocolate-coated wafers. It's available from January 12 through January 25, 2026, in Bundtlet size only, while supplies last. - New Chocolate Raspberry Heart Made with Dove (pictured) - Ready for Valentine's Day, this chocolate cake is filled with raspberry puree and topped with signature cream cheese frosting, a drizzle of raspberry puree, and a Dove chocolate heart. It's available from February 2 through February 15, 2026, in Bundtlet size only, while supplies last. Photo via Nothing Bundt Cakes. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

    Wendy's Offers 1-Cent Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger with Purchase on December 30, 2025
    Wendy's celebrates National Bacon Day today, December 30, 2025, with a deal where you can get a Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger for $0.01 with any purchase. The offer is available at participating locations nationwide when signed in on the Wendy's app or website. Wendy's Jr. Bacon Cheeseburger features a square beef patty, two strips of bacon, American cheese, lettuce, tomato, and mayo, served on a toasted bun. Prices vary, but it normally costs $3.49 near me in Los Angeles. Photo via Wendy's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

  • Open

    2026 New Year's Deals and Specials
    2026 is coming in fast, and some eateries are celebrating with promotions for your dining dollars. Here's a list of 2026 New Year's fast-food deals and specials: - Crumbl - On December 31, 2025, get a 6-pack for the price of a 4-pack. - Del Taco - Through February 9, 2026, Del Taco is offering a deal where you can get two Grilled Chicken Tacos for $3. - KFC - Through January 5, 2026, there's a buy-one-get-one-free deal on 8-piece fried chicken buckets for KFC rewards members. - Krispy Kreme - From December 30, 2025, through January 1, 2026, you can get two dozen donuts for $20.26 at participating locations chain-wide. Choose either two Original Glazed Dozens or one Original Glazed and one Assorted Dozen. The chain is also offering free delivery on orders over $5. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    $6 Fish & Chicken Basket Returns to Long John Silver's
    The $6 Fish & Chicken Basket is back at Long John Silver's for a limited time at participating locations chain-wide. The discounted combo meal includes a battered and fried piece of wild-caught Alaska pollock, a Chicken Plank (a battered and fried white-meat chicken tender), a side, and two hush puppies. Photo via Long John Silver's. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Little Caesars Offers Two Large 1-Topping Pizzas for $4.99 Each
    Little Caesars is offering an online-only, limited-time deal where you can get two large 1-topping pizzas for $4.99 each ($9.98 total). The offer is $1 more per pizza (i.e., $5.99 each) in a few markets (including California). You can redeem the offer using the code "PIZZAPIZZA" ("PIZZAPIZZA1" in the more expensive markets). It is only good on the chain's original round crust. The code is a nod to when Little Caesars' signature deal was the "Pizza! Pizza!" deal, which eventually gave way to the $5 Hot-N-Ready promotion, which ended in 2022. Photo via Little Caesars. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Arby's Debuts New Italian Beef Dip
    Arby's introduces its take on an Italian beef sandwich with the launch of the new Italian Beef Dip. The chain also adds a new Peach Cobbler Roll. Available for a limited time, the new sandwich features thin-sliced roast beef, Swiss cheese, and giardiniera, served on a warm sub roll with au jus for dipping. It's basically Arby's French Dip, only with the addition of giardiniera. Prices vary, but the Italian Beef Dip costs $7.19 (versus $7.09 for a French Dip) at an Arby's restaurant here in Los Angeles. The new Dip differs slightly from the test item from last year. It now includes cheese and lacks the premium top round roast beef that was being tested. The Peach Cobbler Roll is a new, limited-time dessert that comes two to an order. It features a rolled-up crispy pastry stuffed with peaches, graham cracker, and bourbon vanilla filling. An order costs $2.89 near me. Photos via Arby's. Nutritional Info - Arby's Italian Beef Dip (343g) Calories - 680 Fat - 37g (Saturated Fat - 13g) Sodium - 2900mg Carbs - 52g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 35g Nutritional Info - Arby's Peach Cobbler Roll - 2 pieces (105g) Calories - 350 Fat - 16g (Saturated Fat - 6g) Sodium - 570mg Carbs - 46g (Sugar - 16g) Protein - 4g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

    Crumbl Bakes New Strawberry Brownie and More Through January 3, 2026
    Crumbl bakes new Strawberry Brownie and more for this week from December 29, 2025, through January 3, 2026. With the new year arriving this week, the cookie bakery chain is also offering a deal on December 31, 2025, where you can get a 6-pack of cookies for the price of a 4-pack. Here's what you'll find on the dessert rotation at Crumbl this week: - New Strawberry Brownie - A chilled fudge brownie infused with freeze-dried strawberry pieces, topped with strawberry cream cheese frosting, fresh strawberry slices, and a white drizzle. - Birthday Cake Cookie featuring Oreo - A warm cookie made with Oreo cookie pieces, topped with cake batter cream cheese frosting, more Oreo pieces, and rainbow sprinkles. - New York Cheesecake Cookie - A chilled buttery graham cracker cookie topped with vanilla cheesecake frosting and graham cracker streusel. - Nilla Bean Cupcake Cookie - A warm vanilla bean cookie topped with vanilla cream cheese frosting and white sprinkles. - S'mores Skillet Cookie featuring Hershey's Chocolate - A warm, graham cookie baked with pieces of Hershey's Chocolate, topped with marshmallow mousse, a drizzle of melted chocolate, and graham cracker streusel. - Milk Chocolate Chip Cookie - A warm cookie packed with milk chocolate chips. - Waffle Cookie - A warm waffle cookie topped with a scoop of buttercream frosting and served with a side of syrup. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 16 min )

    IHOP Offers Free Bottomless Pancakes with Select Breakfast Combos from January 5 through March 30, 2026
    Starting Monday, January 5, 2026, IHOP will be offering a deal where you can get free Bottomless Pancakes with the purchase of select breakfast combos at participating locations nationwide. The chain has not yet revealed which combos are eligible for the promotion (my guess would be the combos that already include pancakes).     Krispy Kreme Offers $12 Donut Dozens Through December 28, 2025
    Krispy Kreme is running a post-Christmas deal where you can get a Classic Assorted or Original Glazed dozen donuts for $12 each. The discounted dozen is available at participating US locations online and in-store through December 28, 2025. You can purchase up to four discounted dozens. The chain also has a limited-time, online-only deal where you can get a 24-count box of Original Glazed Donut Dots for $5 when you make a purchase of $5 or more. You'll need to use the code "DOTS" to redeem the offer. Prices vary, but an Original Glazed Dozen normally costs $21.99 near me in Los Angeles, while a Classic Assorted Dozen is $22.99. A 24-count box of Original Glazed Donut Dots is normally $6.29. Photo via Krispy Kreme. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )
    Taco Bell Introduces New Confetti Cookie Freeze
    In time for New Year's, Taco Bell welcomes the new Confetti Cookie Freeze as its latest flavor of slush ice. The drink features a vanilla cream soda slushy mixed with rainbow sprinkles, a pink sugar cookie-flavored syrup, and a swirl of vanilla creme. The Confetti Cookie Freeze is available now for a limited time for a suggested price of $3.69 for a 16-oz regular and $3.89 for a 20-oz large (it costs $3.99 and $4.19, respectively) near me in Los Angeles. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Confetti Cookie Freeze (regular size) Calories - 220 Fat - 1g (Saturated Fat - 0.5g) Sodium - 80mg Carbs - 55g (Sugar - 53g) Protein - 0g Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

    KFC Offers BOGO 8-piece Fried Chicken Bucket Deal on December 31, 2025
    As a special for New Year's Eve, KFC is offering a buy-one-get-one-free deal on 8-piece buckets of fried chicken on December 31, 2025. The deal is available only to KFC Rewards members when ordering online through the KFC website or mobile app at participating locations nationwide. The 8-piece bucket is comprised of fried chicken legs and thighs only (i.e., dark meat). According to KFC, millions of people order takeout or delivery on New Year's Eve and "fried chicken, bubbly, and caviar have become the high–low pairing of the moment." Photo via KFC. Read more at Brand Eating!  ( 15 min )

Here's what's included: Tuesday Drops 12/30/25 - $1 Crunchwrap for the first 30,000 rewards members at 2PM PT (limit one per user). 1/6/26 - $1 Chicken Quesadilla for the first 30,000 rewards members at 2PM PT (limit one per user). 1/20/26 - $1 Chalupa from 2PM –3PM PT (limit one per user). In-App Deals Through 1/4/26 - $0 delivery fee with the purchase of any Cantina Chicken Menu item (excludes Avocado Verde Salsa Sauce Packet) every Thursday (except December 25th) and from Saturday to Monday.
